steps.title: Interpret the problem
steps.content: We need to find the fixed amount withdrawn each time a movie is rented. This is the rate of change in the linear function.

steps.title: Test the answer choices
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice B (3): If 3 dollars are withdrawn per movie, the account would have $21 - 3m$ dollars after renting $m$ movies. This matches the given function $f(m) = 21 - 3m$ exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
